name: python3-aiosmb
title: python3-aiosmb
description:
Fully asynchronous SMB library (Python 3)
This package contains a fully asynchronous SMB library.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use asmbcertreq because Fully asynchronous SMB library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use asmbcertreq as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `asmbcertreq [options] [args]` as documented upstream for asmbcertreq.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair asmbcertreq with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `asmbcertreq --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
